use_cases: Profile picture or avatar upload in user settings
Image upload for product listings in e-commerce
Media upload in content management systems
Document or image attachment in forms
ai_summary: A minimalist image upload component with thumbnail preview, supporting both light and dark modes. Uses Ark UI library for accessible file handling with drag-and-drop ready structure, featuring a circular avatar-style preview area and contextual button states that change between Upload and Change image based on selection state.
